summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster. Hydrated open PRs are kept as independent backlog items; refs whose live state was unavailable due GitHub rate limiting are blocked for item-specific human/live-state follow-up. No close, merge, label, comment, fix, or raise-pr action is planned.
